About

The Filmmaker
Behind
The Frame.

Every frame is a chance to say something true.

Miami · FL

01 Bio

Krishna
Pedraja

Originally from Venezuela, I got my start in live broadcasting before film pulled me in and never let go. I hold a Bachelor's in Digital Communications and Media from FIU and an MFA from Full Sail University, and I've been building on that foundation ever since.

My work spans drama, sci-fi, thriller and comedy. Projects like Recall, a gaming world story about ambition and rivalry, and Smokes, which digs into mental health in the Air Force, are good examples of the kind of stories I'm drawn to. I care about the ones that mean something.

I work best as a producer or 1st AD, places where I can shape both the creative and the logistics. I'm based in Miami and ready to travel anywhere the project needs me.

Areas of Expertise

Producing Cinematography 1st Assistant Director Unit Production Management Video Editing Script Writing Key Grip Boom Operation Commercial Production
